title: Player Hider (fps boost)
description: This Mod will hide Players from client side which gives you more Fps in loaded minecraft servers
body:
Player Hider

A lightweight and smooth client-side mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that lets you instantly hide other players from your screen for better FPS, cleaner visuals, and distraction-free gameplay.

Perfect for PvP, recording videos, screenshots, streaming, or reducing lag in crowded servers.

Features

* Hide all players instantly with a keybind (Default key - H)
* Client-side only — works on most servers
* Improve FPS in crowded areas
* Clean and simple toggle system
* Lightweight and optimized
* Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.11
* Smooth visibility switching without relogging

 Why Use Player Hider?

Whether you're a content creator, PvP player, or just want a cleaner experience, Player Hider helps you focus on the game without visual clutter from nearby players.

Compatibility

* Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11
* Fabric 

Note

This mod only hides players on your client and does not affect server-side gameplay.

*If the Game Crashes or not opens,try removing immediately fast mod if installed*
